headlines.title: Buildings collapse in Venezuelan capital after powerful earthquakes hit
headlines.snippet: Buildings in Venezuela's capital collapsed following powerful earthquakes that struck the region.

headlines.title: Two years on, Kenyan families still seek justice after Gen Z protests
headlines.snippet: Two years after Gen Z protests, Kenyan families continue to seek justice for those killed and missing. Investigations have stalled, and accountability remains elusive.

headlines.title: Venezuela struck by back-to-back earthquakes, many casualties feared
headlines.snippet: Powerful earthquakes have struck Venezuela, a South American country, with the US Geological Survey indicating that high casualties are probable.

headlines.title: Iran war live: US vows to defend Gulf interests; Israel kills 2 in Lebanon
headlines.snippet: In response to the Iran war, Israel reported killing two people in Lebanon. The US has also vowed to defend Gulf interests.

headlines.title: Trump slams NATO over lax participation in Iran war in talk with Mark Rutte
headlines.snippet: Amid the Iran war, NATO chief Mark Rutte highlighted the use of US bases in Europe and stressed support for the US war effort. Trump discussed NATO's participation.

headlines.title: Trump criticises European allies over lack of support during war on Iran
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump criticized European allies for their perceived lack of support during the US-Israeli war on Iran. He stated that while the US did not require assistance, stronger backing would have been welcomed.

headlines.title: Trump casts doubt on US responsibility for deadly Iran school strike
headlines.snippet: Donald Trump expressed doubt about US responsibility for a deadly Iran school strike, stating he had seen no evidence implicating the United States. The incident occurred on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

headlines.title: Vance says US reviewing conditions for Türkiye's F-35 purchase
headlines.snippet: JD Vance indicated that the US is reviewing the conditions for Türkiye's F-35 purchase, working with the Pentagon to confirm legal requirements are met.

headlines.title: UN nuclear chief says inspections in Iran will go ahead despite Tehran's caution
headlines.snippet: The head of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) stated that UN nuclear inspectors will visit Iran's enrichment sites. These inspections are a key part of the interim agreement aimed at ending the US-Israeli war on Iran.

headlines.title: Israeli army says it struck two people in southern Lebanon
headlines.snippet: The Israeli army announced it struck two individuals in the area it occupies in southern Lebanon, claiming they were in a vehicle and posed a threat.

headlines.title: Al Arabiya correspondent Mohammed Aydah killed in explosion in Yemen’s Mukalla
headlines.snippet: Al Arabiya correspondent Mohammed Aydah was killed in an explosion that occurred in Mukalla, Yemen.

headlines.title: Federal judge bars Trump from implementing proof of citizenship requirement to vote
headlines.snippet: A federal judge has issued an order preventing Trump from implementing a proof of citizenship requirement for voting.

headlines.title: US-Iran deal may leave Netanyahu as biggest casualty
headlines.snippet: A deal between the US and Iran may result in Netanyahu facing significant consequences.

headlines.title: Italy slams NATO chief’s comments on Iran war flights
headlines.snippet: Italy has expressed its disagreement with comments made by NATO chief Mark Rutte regarding Iran war flights.

headlines.title: Russian strike on Ukraine kills mine disposal expert: NGO
headlines.snippet: A Russian strike on Ukraine resulted in the death of a mine disposal expert, according to an NGO.

headlines.title: Trump seeks $88 bn in extra funding, mostly for Iran war
headlines.snippet: The White House has requested an additional $87.6 billion in funding, with a significant portion allocated for the Iran war.

headlines.title: Colombia president-elect to work with Israel 'like never before'
headlines.snippet: The president-elect of Colombia has stated intentions to work with Israel in an unprecedented manner.

headlines.title: UK government's answer to stolen Palestinian land? Ad watchdog
headlines.snippet: The UK government's response to the sale of illegal Israeli settlement homes in London involves an advertising watchdog, highlighting the limited impact of recent sanctions.

headlines.title: Syria trial opens for Assad cousin accused of war crimes
headlines.snippet: A trial has commenced in Syria for Wassim al-Assad, a cousin of Bashar al-Assad, accused of war crimes and crimes against humanity.

headlines.title: US to progress with Turkey jet engine sales ahead of NATO summit
headlines.snippet: The United States plans to move forward with jet engine sales to Turkey before a NATO summit, continuing generally warm ties that have existed under Trump.
